debug/input_trace.rs.reason: Rust-only debug utility for input event tracing

emCore/rect.rs.reason: Rust-specific Rect/PixelRect newtypes; C++ passes loose (x,y,w,h) doubles

emCore/fixed.rs.reason: Rust-specific Fixed12 newtype for sub-pixel math; C++ uses inline integer arithmetic

emCore/toolkit_images.rs.reason: Rust-specific TGA resource loader; C++ loads toolkit images via emGetInsResImage at point of use

emBorder.h.note: emBorder class in border.rs; ContentAlignment (emAlignment) in alignment.rs

emColor.h.note: emColor class in color.rs; X11 color name table (for FromName) in x11_colors.rs

emColorField.h.note: emColorField in color_field.rs; ScalarFieldPanel wrapper (used by ColorField expansion) in field_panel.rs
